betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The deeds of great civilizations.
Their mistakes, their regrets.
The narrativization of events.
The rewriting of happenings.
The projections of opinions.
And in front of it all, people. And their stories, their histories.
History.
A love for people, and the acknowledgement of their nature.
Patters emerging. Echoes resounding. Analogies forming.
And differences, discrepacies.
Not a straight line. Not even a looping one. The beautiful chaos of life, carried through the generations of all people.
The courage of the Arbiter, missing, but now being brought back.
